title: Slalom Canonical Representation
description: Grid with walls, gates (dashed segments through cell centers), and a start cell. Player draws a closed loop crossing all gates in order.

cells.description: m x n grid. 0 = empty, 1 = black wall.

start.description: Position of the circled number (start/end of trail).

gateCount.description: Total number of gates (equals the circled number).

orientation.description: h = horizontal gate (crosses vertical trail), v = vertical gate (crosses horizontal trail).

line.description: Cell index the gate passes through. For v: column index (0-based). For h: row index (0-based).

from.description: Start of gate span (inclusive cell index). For v: row index. For h: col index.

to.description: End of gate span (inclusive cell index). For v: row index. For h: col index.

number.description: Required crossing order (1-indexed), or null if unnumbered.
